segments.text: And he arose from thence, and cometh into the coasts of Judæa by the farther side of Jordan: and the people resort unto him again; and, as he was wont, he taught them again.
And the Pharisees came to him, and asked him,
Is it lawful for a man to put away his wife?
segments.speaker: Pharisees

segments.text: tempting him.
And he answered and said unto them,
Moses suffered to write a bill of divorcement, and to put her away.
segments.speaker: Pharisees

segments.text: And Jesus answered and said unto them,
And in the house his disciples asked him again of the same matter.
And he saith unto them,
And they brought young children to him, that he should touch them: and his disciples rebuked those that brought them.
But when Jesus saw it, he was much displeased, and said unto them,
And he took them up in his arms, put his hands upon them, and blessed them.
And when he was gone forth into the way, there came one running, and kneeled to him, and asked him,
Good Master, what shall I do that I may inherit eternal life?
segments.speaker: Rich Young Ruler

segments.text: And Jesus said unto him,
Master, all these have I observed from my youth.
segments.speaker: Rich Young Ruler

segments.text: Then Jesus beholding him loved him, and said unto him,
And he was sad at that saying, and went away grieved: for he had great possessions.
And Jesus looked round about, and saith unto his disciples,

heading: Riches and the Kingdom of God

segments.text: And the disciples were astonished at his words. But Jesus answereth again, and saith unto them,
Who then can be saved?
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: And Jesus looking upon them saith,
Lo, we have left all, and have followed thee.
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: And Jesus answered and said,

And they were in the way going up to Jerusalem; and Jesus went before them: and they were amazed; and as they followed, they were afraid. And he took again the twelve, and began to tell them what things should happen unto him,
Saying,
And James and John, the sons of Zebedee, come unto him, saying,
Master, we would that thou shouldest do for us whatsoever we shall desire.
segments.speaker: James and John

heading: The Request of James and John

segments.text: And he said unto them,
Grant unto us that we may sit, one on thy right hand, and the other on thy left hand, in thy glory.
segments.speaker: James and John

segments.text: But Jesus said unto them,
We can.
segments.speaker: James and John

segments.text: And Jesus said unto them,
And when the ten heard it, they began to be much displeased with James and John.
But Jesus called them to him, and saith unto them,
And they came to Jericho: and as he went out of Jericho with his disciples and a great number of people, blind Bartimæus, the son of Timæus, sat by the highway side begging.
And when he heard that it was Jesus of Nazareth, he began to cry out, and say,
Jesus, thou Son of David, have mercy on me.
segments.speaker: Bartimaeus

segments.text: Thou Son of David, have mercy on me.
segments.speaker: Bartimaeus

segments.text: And many charged him that he should hold his peace: but he cried the more a great deal,
And Jesus stood still, and commanded him to be called. And they call the blind man, saying unto him, Be of good comfort, rise; he calleth thee.
And he, casting away his garment, rose, and came to Jesus.
And Jesus answered and said unto him,
Lord, that I might receive my sight.
segments.speaker: Bartimaeus

segments.text: And Jesus said unto him,
And immediately he received his sight, and followed Jesus in the way.
